title: A Reward For Study
question: 把今天的“严格计划 + forbidden list + 慌忙藏东西 + 内疚解释 + so...that...”放进学习计划场景。用 word bank 补完整 5 个空。
example_answer: I decided to follow a strict study plan. First of all, I wrote out a long list of things which were forbidden. The list included most of the things I love. When my friend came in, I hurriedly hid a game controller under my book. It was obvious that I was very embarrassed. I smiled guiltily. My plan was so strict that I had to reward myself occasionally.
word_bank: most of the things I love

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 说你决定执行一个严格的学习计划

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 说你先写出一张很长的禁做事项清单
options.english_template: First of all, I wrote out a long list of ___.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 朋友进来时，你慌忙把游戏手柄藏到书下面
options.english_template: When my friend came in, I ___ a game controller under my book.

options.label: D
options.english_template: It was obvious that I was ___.

options.label: E
options.scenario_zh: 你的计划太严格了，所以你说自己得偶尔奖励一下自己
options.english_template: My plan was ___ I had to reward myself occasionally.
